name: @bemedev/i18n
description: Internationalization library for Bemedev projects, providing utilities for managing translations and locale-specific content.

scripts.pnpm:devPreinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json')); const version=require('child_process').execSync('pnpm -v').toString().trim(); pkg.packageManager='pnpm@' + version; fs.writeFileSync('./package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + '\n');"
scripts.build: pnpm run rm:lib && pnpm run rolldown
scripts._ci: pnpm run config && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
scripts.ci:
CI_START=$(date +%s) && pnpm run _ci && pnpm run p-q && echo "
✅ CI takes $(($(date +%s) - CI_START))s
"
scripts.ci:off:
CI_START=$(date +%s) && pnpm run config:off && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run p-q && echo "
✅ CI takes $(($(date +%s) - CI_START))s
"
scripts.ci:admin: pnpm run rm && pnpm run upgrade:fast && pnpm run ci
scripts.lint: pnpm run fmt && pnpm run lint:fix
scripts.pretest: pnpm run build && pnpm run size
scripts.rinit: pnpm run rm && pnpm run config
scripts.rinit:off: pnpm run rm && pnpm run config:off
